tasks.label: build stage2
tasks.command: make -C build/release stage2 -j$(nproc 2>/dev/null || sysctl -n hw.logicalcpu 2>/dev/null || echo 4)

tasks.label: build-old
tasks.command: make -C build/release -j$(nproc 2>/dev/null || sysctl -n hw.logicalcpu 2>/dev/null || echo 4) LAKE_EXTRA_ARGS=--old

tasks.label: test
tasks.command: NPROC=$(nproc 2>/dev/null || sysctl -n hw.logicalcpu 2>/dev/null || echo 4); CTEST_OUTPUT_ON_FAILURE=1 make -C build/release test -j$NPROC ARGS="-j$NPROC"
